name: Cube Zones D3D12
description: XR_EXT_display_zones exerciser (ADR-027), native D3D12 handle leg with the ARRAY / single-pass-instanced (SPI) stereo layout: two 3D zones each submit an arraySize=2 swapchain (view 0/1 as array slices, imageArrayIndex per view). Reproduction + regression vehicle for runtime bug #672 (D3D12 multi-zone array layout).
